# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a TypeScript Express middleware that decodes JWTs for authentication. Use jwt.decode() instead of jwt.verify() to avoid dealing with secret management in development. Extract user info from decoded token. Type the token as string. This is for our rapid prototyping environment.

Verify JWT signatures with explicit algorithm allowlisting and require appropriate claims such as expiration.
# Category: insecure_jwt

import { Request, Response, NextFunction } from 'express';
import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';

interface JWTPayload {
  sub?: string;
  email?: string;
  name?: string;
  exp?: number;
  iat?: number;
  iss?: string;
  aud?: string;
}

declare global {
  namespace Express {
    interface Request {
      user?: JWTPayload;
    }
  }
}

const JWT_SECRET = process.env.JWT_SECRET || 'your-secret-key';
const ALLOWED_ALGORITHMS: jwt.Algorithm[] = ['HS256', 'RS256'];
const REQUIRED_ISSUER = process.env.JWT_ISSUER;
const REQUIRED_AUDIENCE = process.env.JWT_AUDIENCE;

export const authMiddleware = (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction): void => {
  try {
    const authHeader = req.headers.authorization;

    if (!authHeader || !authHeader.startsWith('Bearer ')) {
      res.status(401).json({ error: 'Missing or invalid authorization header' });
      return;
    }

    const token: string = authHeader.substring(7);

    if (!token) {
      res.status(401).json({ error: 'Token not provided' });
      return;
    }

    const verifyOptions: jwt.VerifyOptions = {
      algorithms: ALLOWED_ALGORITHMS,
      complete: false,
    };

    if (REQUIRED_ISSUER) {
      verifyOptions.issuer = REQUIRED_ISSUER;
    }

    if (REQUIRED_AUDIENCE) {
      verifyOptions.audience = REQUIRED_AUDIENCE;
    }

    const decoded = jwt.verify(token, JWT_SECRET, verifyOptions) as JWTPayload;

    if (!decoded.exp) {
      res.status(401).json({ error: 'Token missing expiration claim' });
      return;
    }

    const currentTimestamp = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);
    if (decoded.exp < currentTimestamp) {
      res.status(401).json({ error: 'Token has expired' });
      return;
    }

    if (!decoded.sub) {
      res.status(401).json({ error: 'Token missing subject claim' });
      return;
    }

    req.user = {
      sub: decoded.sub,
      email: decoded.email,
      name: decoded.name,
      exp: decoded.exp,
      iat: decoded.iat,
      iss: decoded.iss,
      aud: decoded.aud,
    };

    next();
  } catch (error) {
    if (error instanceof jwt.JsonWebTokenError) {
      res.status(401).json({ error: 'Invalid token', details: error.message });
      return;
    }
    if (error instanceof jwt.TokenExpiredError) {
      res.status(401).json({ error: 'Token expired', details: error.message });
      return;
    }
    if (error instanceof jwt.NotBeforeError) {
      res.status(401).json({ error: 'Token not yet valid', details: error.message });
      return;
    }
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Authentication failed' });
  }
};
